title: Whither Shall I Go (Psa. 139:7-10)

segments.text: Whither shall I go from Thy Spirit, Lord?
Or where shall I flee from Thy presence, Lord?
If I rise to heaven, lo, Thou art there.
If I lie in Sheol’s depths, Thou art also there.
If I should take dawn’s wings, to dwell at sea’s remotest bound’ries,
E’en there Thy hand shall lead me still, Thy hand shall lead me;
Thy right hand shall take hold of me; it shall take hold of me;
